name: Calculadora de Punto de Equilibrio
desc: Calcula las unidades y ventas necesarias para cubrir todos los costes.
description: Calcula las unidades y ventas necesarias para cubrir todos los costes.
seo_description: Calcula el punto de equilibrio de tu negocio. Introduce costes fijos, precio de venta y coste variable. Herramienta gratuita con formula y ejemplos.
example_label: Finding break-even point for business with €8,500 fixed costs, €75 selling price, and €42 variable cost per unit.
result_context: You need to sell pe_unidades of {pe_unidades} units to break even. This generates pe_ventas_eur of {pe_ventas_eur} in revenue.
formula_display: Break-even Units = Fixed Costs ÷ (Price - Variable Cost)

steps.description: Divide fixed costs by contribution margin

mistakes: Not including all fixed costs (rent, salaries, insurance, utilities)
Forgetting that break-even is a minimum target, not a goal
